mapper.select: SELECT id, train_number AS trainNumber, date, route_id AS routeId, departure_time AS departureTime, arrival_time AS arrivalTime, ticket_total AS ticketTotal, ticket_sold AS ticketSold, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime, price FROM train_schedule WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, train_number AS trainNumber, date, route_id AS routeId, departure_time AS departureTime, arrival_time AS arrivalTime, ticket_total AS ticketTotal, ticket_sold AS ticketSold, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime, price FROM train_schedule
mapper.update: UPDATE train_schedule SET train_number = #{trainNumber}, date = #{date}, route_id = #{routeId}, departure_time = #{departureTime}, arrival_time = #{arrivalTime}, ticket_total = #{ticketTotal}, price = #{price}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
